Object# InAppPurchaseLocalization.Attributes

App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
object InAppPurchaseLocalization.Attributes
```

## [Properties](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/inapppurchaselocalization/attributes-data.dictionary#properties)

`description``string`

`locale``string`The specified locale. To learn more, see [Managing metadata in your app by using locale shortcodes](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/managing-metadata-in-your-app-by-using-locale-shortcodes).

`name``string`

`state``string`

 Possible Values: `PREPARE_FOR_SUBMISSION, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED`## [See Also](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/inapppurchaselocalization/attributes-data.dictionary#see-also)
